faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services

items.q: How long does it take to build a website?
items.a: Timeline depends on complexity. A company profile takes 1-2 weeks, while a full-featured system can take 4-8 weeks. We'll provide a clear timeline during consultation.

items.q: Do I need to provide content and images?
items.a: We recommend providing your own content for authenticity. However, we can assist with copywriting and stock photography for an additional fee.
Absolutely. All our websites are built mobile-first and fully responsive across all devices and screen sizes.

items.q: Do you provide hosting and domain?
items.a: We can help you set up hosting and domain registration. We recommend reliable providers and can manage the technical setup for you.

items.q: Can I update the website myself after launch?
items.a: For Professional and Premium packages, we provide a CMS that lets you update content easily. We also provide training sessions.

items.q: What if I need changes after the project is done?
items.a: We offer maintenance packages and are always available for additional development work. Premium package includes 3 months of free maintenance.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Meet the people behind Garapin.id
about.story:
Garapin.id was founded by Mustofa Habibi Bafadhal with a clear vision: to make professional website development accessible to businesses of all sizes. We believe that every business deserves a digital presence that reflects its quality and professionalism.

Starting from a passion for technology and design, we've grown into a trusted web development agency serving UMKM, corporations, government institutions, schools, hospitals, and various other organizations across Indonesia.
about.vision: To become Indonesia's most trusted web development partner, known for quality, integrity, and innovation.
about.mission: Deliver high-quality websites that drive real business results. Maintain transparent communication and honest practices. Continuously innovate with the latest technologies. Provide exceptional post-launch support.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.desc: We never compromise on quality. Every pixel, every line of code matters.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.desc: Honest communication, realistic promises, and transparent pricing.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Always learning and adopting the best technologies and practices.

support.title: Commitment
support.desc: We stand by our work and provide ongoing support even after launch.

about.founder_desc: With years of experience in web development and a deep understanding of business needs, Mustofa leads the team in delivering exceptional digital solutions.
